title: Molly Malone
description: A well-known Irish folk song arranged for the runtime-backed letter-note and fingering chart song page.
alignedLyrics: In Dub lin's fair cit y, where girls are so pret ty, I
first set my eyes on sweet Mol ly Ma lone. As she
pushed her wheel bar row thru streets broad and
nar row sing ing, "Coc kles! and Mus sels, a live, a live oh!" A
live, a live oh, _ a live, a live oh, _ sing ing "Coc kles and
Mus sels a live a live oh!" _ _ _ _ _
